summary: Frontend testing completed for Landing Page emotional experience transformation. All 8 requested features verified working: Living Soul Orb animations in hero and Mira sections, Video Testimonials with 3 cards, Membership Tiers with correct pricing, Hero CTAs functional, and mobile responsiveness confirmed.

living_soul_orb_hero.details: Living Soul Orb renders in hero section with aurora-like animations, breathing effects, and orbiting particles

living_soul_orb_mira.details: Living Soul Orb renders in Mira section with size='xl' and floating text bubbles
verified_elements: Floating bubble: 'I remember Max loves belly rubs'
Floating bubble: 'His vet appointment is tomorrow'

video_testimonials_section.details: Video Testimonials section displays 3 video cards with play buttons and duration badges
verified_elements: Section title: 'Families Who Trusted Us With Their Most Precious Members'
Play buttons (PlayCircle icons) on each card

testimonials.name: The Sharma Family
testimonials.quote: They remembered Bruno's fear of thunderstorms before I even mentioned it.

testimonials.name: Rahul & Max
testimonials.quote: When Max got sick at 2am, Mira already had his full health history ready.

testimonials.name: The Kapoor Family
testimonials.quote: They sent Luna a birthday cake without me even asking.

membership_tiers_section.details: Membership Tiers section shows 3 tiers with correct pricing and features
verified_elements: Section title: 'Transform Your Pet's Life Starting Today'
Soul Guardian tier: ₹999/month with 'Most Popular' badge and 8 features
Trust badges: 30-Day Money Back, Secure & Private, Cancel Anytime, Free Trial Available

hero_cta_buttons.details: Hero section CTA buttons work correctly
verified_elements: Discover Your Pet's Soul button (data-testid='hero-discover-soul-btn') - visible and enabled, links to /membership
Watch Our Story button - visible and enabled, opens video modal

video_modal.details: Video modal opens when 'Watch Our Story' is clicked
verified_elements: Every Pet Has a Soul™ tagline

mobile_responsiveness.details: All new sections are mobile responsive at 390x844 viewport

verified_layouts.hero_section: Living Soul Orb centered, headline stacked, CTAs visible
verified_layouts.video_testimonials: Cards stacked vertically, play buttons and duration badges visible
verified_layouts.membership_tiers: Cards stacked vertically, Explorer and Soul Guardian visible with features
verified_layouts.mira_section: Living Soul Orb visible, features listed, Talk to Mira button accessible

console_logs: PWA: Content is cached for offline use

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 landing page emotional experience features verified working: (1) Living Soul Orb in hero section with aurora animations, breathing effects, orbiting particles, (2) Living Soul Orb in Mira section with floating text bubbles, (3) Video Testimonials section with 3 cards (Sharma Family/Bruno, Rahul & Max, Kapoor Family/Luna) with play buttons and duration badges, (4) Membership Tiers section with Explorer (Free), Soul Guardian (₹999/month, Most Popular), Soul Family (₹1,999/month), (5) Hero CTAs functional - Discover Your Pet's Soul links to /membership, Watch Our Story opens video modal, (6) Video modal works with brand story clips, (7) Mobile responsive at 390x844, (8) No JavaScript errors on page load.
